source:
#Get Parameter from controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "SharePoint_Bronze"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#display values
display(df)
display(df2)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container "demodata/demo_aemo"
#source_file = '' #CUSTOMER__full_32a72bd2-bd94-467f-9030-6b9f20dad676_20240204_100201

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

#Get Current Date
#Bronze_LoadDate=spark.sql("select current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0]
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Bronze_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Bronze_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']

# Display values
print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)

# Drop database and storage folder
spark.sql("DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS LACIMA_Bronze CASCADE")
raw_output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}"
mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)
# Table SPM_Name: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="SPM_Name"

#Create Bronze Table

spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    ID INT,
    StationName STRING,
    Capacity DOUBLE,
    StartDate DATE,
    EndDate DATE,
    MLF DOUBLE,
    AuxiliaryLoss DOUBLE,
    NumberOfUnits DOUBLE, 
    Duration INT,
    FileName STRING,
    CDC_LoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDC_StartDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDC_EndDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDC_Ops INT,
    CDC_CurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
    SPM_NameHashKey STRING,
    SPM_NameHashDiff STRING   
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
# load parquet file as dataframe
raw_df = spark.read.format("parquet").load(f'abfss://{source_container}@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{source_path}/{db_tablename}/')
display(raw_df)

# Add CDC columns
from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format, to_date, when
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace
from pyspark.sql.types import DecimalType

#raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("StartDate",when(col("StartDate").isNotNull(), to_date("StartDate", 'd/MM/yyyy')).otherwise(None))
#raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("EndDate",when(col("EndDate").isNotNull(), to_date("EndDate", 'd/MM/yyyy')).otherwise(None))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("SPM_NameHashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "NameID"), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("SPM_NameHashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "NameID","StationName","Capacity", regexp_replace("StartDate", "-|[/.:]", ""), regexp_replace("EndDate", "-|[/.:]", ""),"MLF","AuxiliaryLoss","NumberOfUnits","Duration"), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_LoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_StartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_EndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_CurrentFlag", lit(1))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_Ops", lit(1))
#raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("AuxiliaryLoss", raw_df["AuxiliaryLoss"].cast(DecimalType(precision=12, scale=10)))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("AuxiliaryLoss", concat((col("AuxiliaryLoss") * 100).cast(DecimalType(precision=8, scale=4))))

# Order by Mofified Date in asc 
raw_df = raw_df.orderBy(col("Modified").desc())

# Fix duplicate issue
raw_df = raw_df.dropDuplicates(['SPM_NameHashKey'])

#display(raw_df)

# Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# Display
print(Bronze_Insert_Pre)
print(Bronze_Update_Pre)
print(Bronze_Delete_Pre)
print(Bronze_LoadDate)

# SCD2 logic
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
raw_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.SPM_NameHashKey = s.SPM_NameHashKey AND t.CDC_CurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.SPM_NameHashDiff <> s.SPM_NameHashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDC_EndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDC_CurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDC_Ops = s.CDC_Ops + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT ( ID, StationName, Capacity, StartDate, EndDate, MLF, AuxiliaryLoss, NumberOfUnits, Duration, FileName , CDC_LoadDate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_EndDate, CDC_Ops, CDC_CurrentFlag, SPM_NameHashKey, SPM_NameHashDiff)
      VALUES (s.NameID, s.StationName, s.Capacity, s.StartDate, s.EndDate, s.MLF, s.AuxiliaryLoss, s.NumberOfUnits, s.Duration, s.FileName , CDC_LoadDate, s.CDC_StartDate, s.CDC_EndDate, 1, s.CDC_CurrentFlag, s.SPM_NameHashKey, s.SPM_NameHashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.SPM_NameHashKey = s.SPM_NameHashKey AND t.CDC_CurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.SPM_NameHashDiff <> s.SPM_NameHashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDC_EndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDC_CurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDC_Ops = s.CDC_Ops + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT ( ID, StationName, Capacity, StartDate, EndDate, MLF, AuxiliaryLoss, NumberOfUnits, Duration, FileName , CDC_LoadDate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_EndDate, CDC_Ops, CDC_CurrentFlag, SPM_NameHashKey, SPM_NameHashDiff)
      VALUES (s.NameID, s.StationName, s.Capacity, s.StartDate, s.EndDate, s.MLF, s.AuxiliaryLoss, s.NumberOfUnits, s.Duration, s.FileName , s.CDC_LoadDate, s.CDC_StartDate, s.CDC_EndDate, 1, s.CDC_CurrentFlag, s.SPM_NameHashKey, s.SPM_NameHashDiff)

# Deletion logic

# Find the recored that need to be deleted.
df_list = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT SPM_NameHashKey FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} 
                        WHERE SPM_NameHashKey NOT IN (SELECT SPM_NameHashKey FROM temp_table)
                        AND CDC_CurrentFlag = true;
                    """)

# Convert dataframe to list
ls = [list(x)[0] for x in df_list.collect()]
hash_keys = "','".join(ls)

# Print list
hash_keys

# Update deleted recoreds to cdc_ops to 0
spark.sql(f"""
          UPDATE {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} 
             SET CDC_EndDate = '{Bronze_LoadDate}',
                 CDC_CurrentFlag = false,
                 CDC_Ops = 0
          WHERE SPM_NameHashKey IN ('{hash_keys}')

#Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Bronze_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_CurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Bronze_Update = Bronze_Update_Post - Bronze_Update_Pre
Bronze_Insert = (Bronze_Insert_Post - Bronze_Insert_Pre) + Bronze_Update
Bronze_Delete = Bronze_Delete_Post - Bronze_Delete_Pre
Bronze_ActiveRows = Bronze_ActiveRecord_Post 
Bronze_TotalRows = Bronze_TotalRowCount_Post

# Display
print(Bronze_Insert)
print(Bronze_Update)
print(Bronze_Delete)
print(Bronze_ActiveRows)
print(Bronze_TotalRows)

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Bronze_LoadDate,Bronze_Insert,Bronze_Update,Bronze_Delete,Bronze_ActiveRows,Bronze_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)
#display(df_test)

#Write to controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
# Table SPM_Name: END
# Table SPM_Category: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="SPM_Category"

#Create Bronze Table

spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    ID INT,
    Category1 STRING,
    Category2 STRING,
    Category3 STRING,
    Category4 STRING,
    Category5 STRING,
    Category6 STRING,
    FileName STRING,
    CDC_LoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDC_StartDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDC_EndDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDC_Ops INT,
    CDC_CurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
    SPM_CategoryHashKey STRING,
    SPM_CategoryHashDiff STRING   
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
# load parquet file as dataframe
raw_df = spark.read.format("parquet").load(f'abfss://{source_container}@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{source_path}/{db_tablename}/')

# Add CDC columns
from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws

raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("SPM_CategoryHashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "CategoryID"), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("SPM_CategoryHashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "CategoryID","Category1","Category2","Category3","Category4","Category5","Category6"), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_LoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_StartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_EndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_CurrentFlag", lit(1))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_Ops", lit(1))
#display(raw_df)

# Order by Creation Date in asc 
raw_df = raw_df.orderBy(col("FileName").asc())

# Fix duplicate issue
raw_df = raw_df.dropDuplicates(['SPM_CategoryHashKey'])

# Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# Display
print(Bronze_Insert)
print(Bronze_Update)
print(Bronze_Delete)
print(Bronze_ActiveRows)
print(Bronze_TotalRows)

# SCD2 logic
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
raw_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.SPM_CategoryHashKey = s.SPM_CategoryHashKey AND t.CDC_CurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.SPM_CategoryHashDiff <> s.SPM_CategoryHashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDC_EndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDC_CurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDC_Ops = s.CDC_Ops + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (ID, Category1, Category2, Category3, Category4, Category5, Category6, FileName , CDC_LoadDate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_EndDate, CDC_Ops, CDC_CurrentFlag, SPM_CategoryHashKey, SPM_CategoryHashDiff)
      VALUES (s.CategoryID, s.Category1, s.Category2, s.Category3, s.Category4, s.Category5, s.Category6, s.FileName , s.CDC_LoadDate, s.CDC_StartDate, s.CDC_EndDate, 1, s.CDC_CurrentFlag, s.SPM_CategoryHashKey, s.SPM_CategoryHashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.SPM_CategoryHashKey = s.SPM_CategoryHashKey AND t.CDC_CurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.SPM_CategoryHashDiff <> s.SPM_CategoryHashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDC_EndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDC_CurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDC_Ops = s.CDC_Ops + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (ID, Category1, Category2, Category3, Category4, Category5, Category6, FileName , CDC_LoadDate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_EndDate, CDC_Ops, CDC_CurrentFlag, SPM_CategoryHashKey, SPM_CategoryHashDiff)
      VALUES (s.CategoryID, s.Category1, s.Category2, s.Category3, s.Category4, s.Category5, s.Category6, s.FileName , s.CDC_LoadDate, s.CDC_StartDate, s.CDC_EndDate, 1, s.CDC_CurrentFlag, s.SPM_CategoryHashKey, s.SPM_CategoryHashDiff)

# Deletion logic

# Find the recored that need to be deleted.
df_list = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT SPM_CategoryHashKey FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} 
                        WHERE SPM_CategoryHashKey NOT IN (SELECT SPM_CategoryHashKey FROM temp_table)
                        AND CDC_CurrentFlag = true;
                    """)

# Convert dataframe to list
ls = [list(x)[0] for x in df_list.collect()]
hash_keys = "','".join(ls)

# Print list
hash_keys

# Update deleted recoreds to cdc_ops to 0
spark.sql(f"""
          UPDATE {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} 
             SET CDC_EndDate = '{Bronze_LoadDate}',
                 CDC_CurrentFlag = false,
                 CDC_Ops = 0
          WHERE SPM_CategoryHashKey IN ('{hash_keys}')

#Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Bronze_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_CurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Bronze_Update = Bronze_Update_Post - Bronze_Update_Pre
Bronze_Insert = (Bronze_Insert_Post - Bronze_Insert_Pre) + Bronze_Update
Bronze_Delete = Bronze_Delete_Post - Bronze_Delete_Pre
Bronze_ActiveRows = Bronze_ActiveRecord_Post 
Bronze_TotalRows = Bronze_TotalRowCount_Post

# Display
print(Bronze_Insert)
print(Bronze_Update)
print(Bronze_Delete)
print(Bronze_ActiveRows)
print(Bronze_TotalRows)

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Bronze_LoadDate,Bronze_Insert,Bronze_Update,Bronze_Delete,Bronze_ActiveRows,Bronze_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)
#display(df_test)

#Write to controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
# Table SPM_Category: END
# Table SPM_LacimaRiskFactor: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="SPM_LacimaRiskFactor"

#Create Bronze Table

spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    ID INT,
    RiskFactorNames STRING, 
    SPM_Name_ID INT, 
    SPM_Category_ID INT,
    FileName STRING,
    CDC_LoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDC_StartDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDC_EndDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDC_Ops INT,
    CDC_CurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
    SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey STRING,
    SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashDiff STRING   
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
# load parquet file as dataframe
raw_df = spark.read.format("parquet").load(f'abfss://{source_container}@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{source_path}/{db_tablename}/')

# Add CDC columns
from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp, current_timestamp, date_format, to_date, when
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws

raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "RiskFactorID", "RiskFactorNames"), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "RiskFactorID", "RiskFactorNames", "NameID", "CategoryID"), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_LoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_StartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_EndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_CurrentFlag", lit(1))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_Ops", lit(1))
#display(raw_df)

# Order by Creation Date in asc 
raw_df = raw_df.orderBy(col("FileName").asc())

# Fix duplicate issue
raw_df = raw_df.dropDuplicates(['SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey'])

# Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# Display
print(Bronze_Insert)
print(Bronze_Update)
print(Bronze_Delete)
print(Bronze_ActiveRows)
print(Bronze_TotalRows)

# SCD2 logic
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
raw_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey = s.SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey AND t.CDC_CurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashDiff <> s.SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDC_EndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDC_CurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDC_Ops = s.CDC_Ops + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (ID, RiskFactorNames, SPM_Name_ID, SPM_Category_ID, FileName , CDC_LoadDate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_EndDate, CDC_Ops, CDC_CurrentFlag, SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey, SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashDiff)
      VALUES (s.RiskFactorID, s.RiskFactorNames, s.NameID, s.CategoryID, s.FileName , s.CDC_LoadDate, s.CDC_StartDate, s.CDC_EndDate, 1, s.CDC_CurrentFlag, s.SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey, s.SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey = s.SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey AND t.CDC_CurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashDiff <> s.SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDC_EndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDC_CurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDC_Ops = s.CDC_Ops + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (ID, RiskFactorNames, SPM_Name_ID, SPM_Category_ID, FileName , CDC_LoadDate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_EndDate, CDC_Ops, CDC_CurrentFlag, SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey, SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashDiff)
      VALUES (s.RiskFactorID, s.RiskFactorNames, s.NameID, s.CategoryID, s.FileName , s.CDC_LoadDate, s.CDC_StartDate, s.CDC_EndDate, 1, s.CDC_CurrentFlag, s.SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey, s.SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashDiff)

# Deletion logic

# Find the recored that need to be deleted.
df_list = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} 
                        WHERE SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey NOT IN (SELECT SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey FROM temp_table)
                        AND CDC_CurrentFlag = true;
                    """)

# Convert dataframe to list
ls = [list(x)[0] for x in df_list.collect()]
hash_keys = "','".join(ls)

# Print list
hash_keys

# Update deleted recoreds to cdc_ops to 0
spark.sql(f"""
          UPDATE {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} 
             SET CDC_EndDate = '{Bronze_LoadDate}',
                 CDC_CurrentFlag = false,
                 CDC_Ops = 0
          WHERE SPM_LacimaRiskFactorHashKey IN ('{hash_keys}')

#Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Bronze_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_CurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Bronze_Update = Bronze_Update_Post - Bronze_Update_Pre
Bronze_Insert = (Bronze_Insert_Post - Bronze_Insert_Pre) + Bronze_Update
Bronze_Delete = Bronze_Delete_Post - Bronze_Delete_Pre
Bronze_ActiveRows = Bronze_ActiveRecord_Post 
Bronze_TotalRows = Bronze_TotalRowCount_Post

# Display
print(Bronze_Insert)
print(Bronze_Update)
print(Bronze_Delete)
print(Bronze_ActiveRows)
print(Bronze_TotalRows)

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")

# Table SPM_RawFixedCost: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="SPM_RawFixedCost"

#Create Bronze Table

spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    SPM_Name_ID INT,
    SPM_Category_ID INT,
    PeriodsInQuarter INT,
    CalendarYear INT,
    FinancialYear INT,
    Quarter INT,
    StartDate DATE,
    EndDate DATE,
    OperatingDays INT,
    SPM_LacimaRiskFactor_ID INT,
    TotalLevelisedCostRecovery DOUBLE,
    FileName STRING,
    CDC_LoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDC_StartDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDC_EndDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDC_Ops INT,
    CDC_CurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
    SPM_RawFixedCostHashKey STRING,
    SPM_RawFixedCostHashDiff STRING   
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
# load parquet file as dataframe
raw_df = spark.read.format("parquet").load(f'abfss://{source_container}@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{source_path}/{db_tablename}/')
# Display datafram and schema
raw_df.printSchema()

# Add CDC columns
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp, to_date, when
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace
from pyspark.sql.types import DecimalType

#raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("StartDate",when(col("StartDate").isNotNull(), to_date("StartDate", 'd/MM/yyyy')).otherwise(None))
#raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("EndDate",when(col("EndDate").isNotNull(), to_date("EndDate", 'd/MM/yyyy')).otherwise(None))
#raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("SPM_RawFixedCostHashKeyvalue2", concat_ws("||", "SPM_Name_ID", "SPM_Category_ID", "StartDate", "SPM_LacimaRiskFactor_ID"))
#raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("SPM_RawFixedCostHashKeyvalue", concat_ws("||", "NameID", "CategoryID", regexp_replace("StartDate", "-|[/.:]", ""), "LacimaRiskFactorID"))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("SPM_RawFixedCostHashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "NameID", "CategoryID", regexp_replace("StartDate", "-|[/.:]", ""), "LacimaRiskFactorID"), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("SPM_RawFixedCostHashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "NameID", "CategoryID", "PeriodsInQuarter", "CalendarYear", "FinancialYear", "Quarter", regexp_replace("StartDate", "-|[/.:]", ""), regexp_replace("EndDate", "-|[/.:]", ""), "OperatingDays", "LacimaRiskFactorID", "TotalLevelisedCostRecovery"), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_LoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_StartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_EndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_CurrentFlag", lit(1))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_Ops", lit(1))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("TotalLevelisedCostRecovery", raw_df["TotalLevelisedCostRecovery"].cast(DecimalType(precision=12, scale=3)))
#display(raw_df)

# Order by Creation Date in asc 
raw_df = raw_df.orderBy(col("FileName").asc())

# Fix duplicate issue
raw_df = raw_df.dropDuplicates(['SPM_RawFixedCostHashKey'])

# Display datafram and schema
raw_df.printSchema()
display(raw_df)

# Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# Display
print(Bronze_Insert_Pre)
print(Bronze_Update_Pre)
print(Bronze_Delete_Pre)

# SCD2 logic
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
raw_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.SPM_RawFixedCostHashKey = s.SPM_RawFixedCostHashKey AND t.CDC_CurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.SPM_RawFixedCostHashDiff <> s.SPM_RawFixedCostHashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDC_EndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDC_CurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDC_Ops = s.CDC_Ops + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (SPM_Name_ID, SPM_Category_ID, PeriodsInQuarter, CalendarYear, FinancialYear, Quarter, StartDate, EndDate, OperatingDays, SPM_LacimaRiskFactor_ID, TotalLevelisedCostRecovery, FileName , CDC_LoadDate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_EndDate, CDC_Ops, CDC_CurrentFlag, SPM_RawFixedCostHashKey, SPM_RawFixedCostHashDiff)
      VALUES (s.NameID, s.CategoryID, s.PeriodsInQuarter, s.CalendarYear, s.FinancialYear, s.Quarter, s.StartDate, s.EndDate, s.OperatingDays,  s.LacimaRiskFactorID, s.TotalLevelisedCostRecovery, s.FileName , s.CDC_LoadDate, s.CDC_StartDate, s.CDC_EndDate, 1, s.CDC_CurrentFlag, s.SPM_RawFixedCostHashKey, s.SPM_RawFixedCostHashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record

    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.SPM_RawFixedCostHashKey = s.SPM_RawFixedCostHashKey AND t.CDC_CurrentFlag == true

      VALUES (s.NameID, s.CategoryID, s.PeriodsInQuarter, s.CalendarYear, s.FinancialYear, s.Quarter, s.StartDate, s.EndDate, s.OperatingDays,  s.LacimaRiskFactorID, s.TotalLevelisedCostRecovery, s.FileName , s.CDC_LoadDate, s.CDC_StartDate, s.CDC_EndDate, 1, s.CDC_CurrentFlag, s.SPM_RawFixedCostHashKey, s.SPM_RawFixedCostHashDiff)
